audit.reason: The description of the bounty is incomplete and lacks crucial elements, such as the full testing and security strategy, the completion of the collaboration details, and the specific role of partnering organizations like @Raflux_io. Also, it lacks clarity in concrete steps for deployment on the Base blockchain.
audit.improvements: Complete the text with detailed information about security measures and the full testing strategy to instill confidence in the reliability of the implementation. Clarify roles of mentioned partners and provide a fuller picture of the deployment process on the Base blockchain. Ensure that all sections, especially about collaboration and testing strategies, are fully detailed and not cut off.
